name: calendar-ai
description: Calendar Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event. start/end in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS).

tools.name: find_free_slot
tools.description: Find free time slots. busy_slots: JSON array of {start, end} objects. date: YYYY-MM-DD.

tools.name: calculate_duration
tools.description: Calculate duration between two ISO 8601 datetime strings.

tools.name: timezone_convert
tools.description: Convert time between UTC offsets. Offsets in hours (e.g., -5 for EST, +1 for CET).
